privileged_info_summary: The task imports a CSV file containing US macroeconomic data (Real GDP and Inflation) with two variables: gdp and inf. The data consists of 12 quarterly observations starting from 1984:1 (Q1 1984). The setup script attempts to source data from /opt/gretl_data/poe5/usa.gdt (which does not exist on the system) and falls back to synthetic fallback data with specific hardcoded quarterly values. The required frequency is 4 (quarterly), the starting observation is 1984:1, and the CSV has lowercase column names gdp and inf. The verified file paths are: input CSV at /home/ga/Documents/raw_macro.csv, output .gdt file at /home/ga/Documents/gretl_output/us_macro_ts.gdt, and plot output at /home/ga/Documents/gretl_output/gdp_plot.png. All metadata values match the implementation in the setup, verification, and export scripts.
